title: Shall 1/4" Drive 90-Tooth Ratchet Wrench Quick Release & Reversible | High-Torque Socket Spinner | Seamless Ratcheting for Vehicle Maintenance
features: [High-Quality Chrome Alloy Construction] Crafted from durable Chrome Alloy, this 1/4 inch 90-tooth ratchet is built to last. The fully polished chrome finish not only adds a sleek look but also makes it easy to clean and maintain, ensuring your tool stays in prime condition for years to come

[Compact and Versatile] With a 4-degree swing arc per revolution, this ratchet is perfect for working in tight spaces. It increases the tool's range of use and allows for faster job completion, making it a versatile addition to any toolbox

[Smooth Ratcheting Action] Precision-machined gears provide a seamless ratcheting experience, capable of withstanding high torque. The bi-directional ratcheting gears and smooth forward/reverse switch allow for easy direction changes without removing the socket from the fastener, saving you time and effort

[Quick Release Feature] The easy-to-press release button on the socket allows for one-handed socket changes, making it a breeze to switch between sockets. This feature is perfect for quick removal and replacement of most threaded fasteners, enhancing your productivity

[Ideal for Any Toolbox] Whether you're a DIY enthusiast or a professional tradesperson, this excellent quick-release ratchet is a must-have for your toolbox. With its 90-tooth mechanism, it ensures a firm grip on nuts and bolts, making it reliable and efficient for a variety of tasks
description: Product Description 90 TOOTH & 4 DEGREES 4-degree swing arc ratchet set for tight spaces, speeds work, tackles hard-to-reach areas, a toolbox essential QUICK-RELEASE BUTTON Quick release button for easy one-handed socket changes, switching between sockets is a breeze REVERSIBLE DESIGN The dual-direction ratchet gear changes smoothly without removing socket, effortless forward/reverse switch saves time & effort ERGONOMIC HANDLE Ergonomic handle reduces fatigue, prevents slippage, and offers a secure grip for extended use, ideal for tough jobs SHALL Ratchet Wrench 3-Pcs Ratchet Wrench Set Add To Basket 1/4" Drive Ratchet Wrench Add To Basket 3/8" Drive Ratchet Wrench Add To Basket 1/2" Drive Ratchet Wrench Add To Basket 3pcs Stubby Ratchet Buying Options 1/4 Flex Head Ratchet Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 177 4.6 out of 5 stars 177 4.6 out of 5 stars 177 4.6 out of 5 stars 177 4.8 out of 5 stars 27 4.6 out of 5 stars 74 Price £29.90 £ 29 . 90 £11.90 £ 11 . 90 £12.90 £ 12 . 90 £22.32 £ 22 . 32 — £16.31 £ 16 . 31 Size 1/4'' & 3/8'' & 1/2'' 1/4'' 3/8'' 1/2'' 1/4'' & 3/8'' & 1/2'' 1/4'' Quick Release Button ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ Tooth 90-Tooth 90-Tooth 90-Tooth 90-Tooth 72-Tooth 72-Tooth Length 5.7''/7.5''/10'' 5.7'' 7.5'' 10'' 3.6''/4.5''/5.25'' 4.21'' Packing Weight 1.2kg 0.2kg 0.39kg 0.67kg 1.15kg 0.13kg Full Polished ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
